# Analyst Brief — NovaGreen Capital (Q1 2025)

NovaGreen Capital rates Project Solaris as HIGH RISK for commercial success.

Reasoning:
- Perovskite cells have historically shown degradation issues outdoors
- The 32% target is considered optimistic by a margin of 3-4 percentage points
- Competing programs (Lunaris, Helia-X) may reach market sooner

Estimated probability of Solaris hitting its 2027 efficiency target: 35%.
